title: Clean Slate
description: A maintained and polished Forge optimization, utility, and bugfix modpack intended to be used as a base for modpacks
body:
## Intended to serve as a foundation for creating and testing new modpacks. Clean Slate is a Forge modpack focused on stable and comprehensive optimizations across various Minecraft versions. Regularly updated to include new mods and to remove or update any that are broken. There is essentially no added content—everything from the content to the menus remains unchanged, with no unnecessary config clutter or extra mod buttons. Most mods are clientside, though some are required on the server (or both). The beauty of this modpacks simplicity is that any mod that isn't a dependency can be removed—and nothing breaks. The pack stays fully functional, no errors, no crashes, no issues. This can be shaped to whatever your liking is, so that your modpack can be stable and optimized yet how you want it before you even create it. I may backport this pack to popular versions in the future (1.16.5, 1.18.2, and maybe 1.19.2) and will definetly update it to newer versions when they replace the current most popular and polished version. For now, this won't happen, because no version above 1.20.1 is currently as big as it is. Remember! This isn't just vanilla with performance mods. This does add changes to the game—though changes that I believe are necessary for a good modpack. But again, don't worry, it does not add actual content (items, blocks, mobs, anything). check the versions' modlists to see what is included in the modpack. This modpack doesn't upload duplicate modlist packs with just the mods updated. For a new version, there has to be added or removed mods. ## Forgery Mod Notice
Spoiler As I stated above, this modpack includes mods that not only boost performance but also add functionality. This pack features Forgery, which adds slightly gameplay-altering tweaks, parity, and balance. You can always disable it, though it is highly recommended, and I personally cannot play the game without it. _Very little noticable changes were enabled with Forgery._ (It can also completely be configured; probably one of the most configurable mods to exist)
